allow: Bash(source backend/.venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true && PYTHONPATH=backend python3 -c "import litellm; keys = [k for k in litellm.model_cost.keys\(\) if 'gemini' in k.lower\(\) and \('image' in k.lower\(\) or 'pro' in k.lower\(\)\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(keys\)[:40]\)\)" 2>/dev/null)
